title: Haya Home 20 Heavy Duty Wheelie Bin Liners 240 Litre Large Refuse Sacks Wheelie Bin Bags For Garden Kitchen House Office Caterers Rubbish made from 100% Waste Recycled Material
features: ✅ SIZE, VARIATION & CAPACITY: Haya Home Wheelie Bin Bags are Large size 20 bin bags on the roll. Each heavy-duty bin bags dimensions are 1194 mm x 1350 mm in size. These wheelie bin liners can fit Wheelie bins with the dimensions of (W) 590mm x (D) 760mm x (H) 1190mm. These garbage bin bag can be used to collect rubbish waste of 120l 140l 180l up to 240 litres easily. These heavy duty bin liners & bin bags can be used for collecting garbage rubbish waste without failing & tearing.

♻️ RECYCLED WASTE: Our heavy duty bin bags are British Made thick and strong black bin liners which are also heavy duty Refuse Sacks & waste bin liner. These bin bags are environmentally friendly as they are made from 100% low Density Polyethylene recycling (LDPE) plastic material. Love your Environment! Suitable for wheelie bin capacity of 120l 140l 180l up to 240 litres, industrial, home, office, work garden waste rubbish & garbage

💪 STRONG AND ROBUST: During the manufacturing of bin liner an extrusion layering is added to give a tensile strength which makes our bin bags very strong and robust allow you to hold 20 Kg of waste without failing.

💧 LEAK PROOF: The stretch, puncture & lift test showed that it can take up to 20 Kg of weight without failing and tearing. Also, seal / Leak proof test showed no leakage and hence, are leak proof which in return every time leave your wheelie bin clean and smell free.

🏴󠁣󠁦󠁵󠁫󠁿British Made: From 100% superior high tech recycled tear resistance and low density polyethylene material, helping to reduce carbon footprint, and making UK greener. Our products are manufactured in the United Kingdom with a stringent quality checks in place.

🤝Commitment: Our focus is on providing the green packaging solution and to reduce the impact on our planet by helping to reduce the carbon footprint. Our customer is important to us if you are not happy with our product please follow amazon product return policy.
description: Performance is not all about the colour and thickness of the bags but resistance against force. British Made bin bag have achieved this by using 100% recycled plastic material (not heavy material such as calcium) which add stretch and improve tensile strength to our black bin bags. This allow our bin liner to lift up to 5 Kg of waste material per bin bag without tearing. Why Choose Haya Home bin bags: ✅Haya Home, heavy duty wheelie bin refuse bin liners are British made and are produce with 100% recycled material. ✅SIZE & VARIATIONS FOR BIN LINER: Each wheelie bin liners heavy duty roll contains approx 20 recycled plastic black bin bags which are 1194 mm x 1350 mm in size. There are 20 'Black Bin Liners' per roll and you will get 20 x 1 black bin bag roll in total bin bags. These are also available in different quantities. ✅Each refuse sack can hold up to approx 240 liters of waste.. These are ideal to use for wheelie bin, kitchen, Garden Garbage Trash Rubbish or industrial waste. ✅Unlike the light duty bin liner, British Made heavy duty black bin bags are made with recycled LDPE. ✅These heavy duty refuse sacks are not weak and therefore, cannot be easily tear and leak which keeps your bin clean and trouble free. ✅Use for everyday household. No more finger popping through the bag. ⚠️Warnings: To avoid danger of suffocation, keep these bags away from babies and children. These bags are not suitable for rubble sacks. Not design for sharp objects.
